summary:
## ⚡ Quick Summary
Glenmore House is an award-winning Georgian wedding and events venue in Surbiton, Surrey, offering rooms, bars, and catering for weddings, meetings, conferences, banquets, and celebrations.

## 📞 Contact Details
- **Address:** 6 The Crescent, Surbiton, Surrey KT6 4BN  
- **Phone:** 020 8399 1415  
- **Email:** info@glenmorehouse.co.uk  
- **Fax:** 020 8399 2876  

### Key Contacts
- **General Manager & Wedding/Events Manager:** Faye Dobbie – faye.stevenson@glenmorehouse.co.uk (ext. 221)  
- **Office Manager & Events Administration:** Isabelle Saulet – info@glenmorehouse.co.uk (ext. 220)  
- **Managing Director:** Robert Dobbie – robert.dobbie@glenmorehouse.co.uk (ext. 223)
